ogbench_feature_host.claim_boundary: Frozen DINO feature-host sidecar; not native OGBench world-model planning.

ogbench_native_use.claim_boundary: Memory-selected target execution under fixed OGBench controllers; reports native env success, not native world-model planning.

ogbench_native_use_repaired_allenv.claim_boundary: Fixed-controller native use from ME-JEPA memory readout where a local audited controller exists. This repaired summary replaces prior multi-object controller-validation failures with rerun native-use results; pointmaze-teleport remains excluded because its native stochastic teleport dynamics do not pass the oracle-label controller gate.

adapter.carrier_scope: one parameter-shared carrier independently applied to all 196 patch trajectories
adapter.injection: residual fused visual replaces only native visual channels before the frozen predictor
adapter.primary_read: frozen predictor final visual output from full-sequence carrier state
adapter.reset_ablation: reinitialize the identical carrier at the first frame of each legal three-frame predictor context

inference.method: matched carrier-seed x native-validation-episode cluster bootstrap preserving four-label counterfactual sets

pointmaze_carrier.study: Frozen official DINO-WM PointMaze transient-goal memory audit

task.counterfactual_design: each native base window is repeated under every label
task.cue_visual: fixed U-maze mini-map with one position-varying red goal dot

pointmaze_external_use.interpretation: External arm-blind goal selection plus released waypoint control in current MuJoCo; this is not native DINO-WM planning.

scope.claim_boundary: external memory-conditioned navigation execution, not native DINO-WM planning
scope.consumer: one shared arm-blind StandardScaler+multinomial LogisticRegression per carrier seed
scope.consumer_feature: exact registered 1/2/4 spatial-pyramid primary full-predictor read
scope.consumer_training_deck: pooled full-state training features from every arm with no arm identifier

prelock_controller_development.selection_rule: smallest horizon with overall oracle >=0.90 and every-goal oracle >=0.875
prelock_controller_development.source: first 8 locked training selections only; no validation episode

scope.simulator: current MuJoCo binding executing XML generated by unmodified released PointMaze source

extra.physical_execution: reported with DINO-WM native PushT simulator deck
reported with existing PushT simulator deck
